questions.text: To divide a line segment in ratio m:n, we need to mark how many points?
questions.explanation: To divide a line segment in ratio m:n, we mark (m+n) equidistant points on a ray making an acute angle with the line segment.

questions.text: A tangent to a circle can be constructed from an external point.
questions.explanation: From an external point, exactly two tangents can be constructed to a circle using compass and straightedge.

questions.text: What is the scale factor in construction of similar triangles?
questions.correctAnswer: The ratio of corresponding sides of the triangle to be constructed to the given triangle.
questions.explanation: Scale factor = (side of new triangle)/(corresponding side of given triangle).

questions.text: To construct a triangle similar to a given triangle with scale factor 3/4, we mark ________ points.
questions.explanation: We mark the larger of numerator and denominator points. For 3/4, we mark 4 points.
